features.name: Flutter Harness Baseline
features.description: Keep repository-local harness docs, commands, structural tests, and generated artifacts available from a clean checkout.
features.evidence: README.md introduces the harness architecture; AGENTS.md, docs/harness/*, tool/harness.dart, and test/harness/architecture_guard_test.dart exist; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check is the primary verification command.

features.name: Feature-First Flutter Architecture
features.description: Preserve domain, data, and presentation boundaries for features with business logic or external data.
features.evidence: test/harness/architecture_guard_test.dart checks required layer presence and forbidden imports for domain and data layers.

features.name: Single Verification Entrypoint
features.description: Expose one repeatable command path for bootstrap, structure, format, analyzer, and test validation.
features.evidence: tool/harness.dart provides bootstrap, doctor, format, structure, test, and check commands; init.sh wraps bootstrap and check for session startup.

features.name: Runtime Harness Signals
features.description: Emit structured app startup and networking events that agents can inspect in debug logs.
features.evidence: lib/core/harness/harness_logger.dart emits [harness] JSON events documented in docs/harness/OPERABILITY.md.

features.name: Walkinglabs Session Lifecycle
features.description: Track scope, progress, evidence, blockers, and next-session handoff using root harness artifacts.
features.evidence: Walkinglabs validate-harness reports 100/100; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check passes with 8 harness structure tests and 154 total Flutter tests; ./init.sh passes bootstrap plus full check.

features.name: CI Harness Alignment
features.description: Run fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check from repository CI as the primary merge validation command.
features.evidence: .github/workflows/harness.yml installs FVM and runs ./init.sh, which bootstraps generated code and runs fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check.

features.name: Project Agent Skills Integration
features.description: Keep official Flutter and Dart agent skills checked into the project harness and guarded by repository-local documentation and structure tests.
features.evidence: .agents/skills contains 9 Flutter skills and 11 Dart skills; docs/harness/SKILLS.md documents usage, updates, and the intentional exclusion of flutter-apply-architecture-best-practices in favor of docs/harness/ARCHITECTURE.md; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart structure verifies the inventory.

features.name: Maestro Spec Evaluation Demo
features.description: Add a minimal human-readable User Profile spec, UI target map, Maestro flow, and explicit harness eval command for device-backed E2E evaluation.
features.evidence: docs/harness/specs/user-profile-flow.md plus .maestro/android and .maestro/ios flows define the minimal User Profile UI flow; docs/harness/specs/acceptance.yaml is Maestro-only for UI acceptance; UserPage and MainTabPage expose Semantics identifiers. Maestro CLI 2.6.1 is installed and fvm dart run tool/harness.dart eval-ios passes on the booted iPhone 16 Pro simulator. Android eval remains a follow-up.

features.name: Spec Evaluation Workflow
features.description: Turn spec evaluation into a repeatable four-stage flow with two review gates: human gives a point, AI drafts a reviewable acceptance script, human approves it, AI implements, then AI runs acceptance and reports a result.
features.evidence: tool/harness.dart exposes spec new / spec review [--approve] / spec accept [--maestro]; docs/harness/specs/README.md documents the four-stage flow, two gates, and the rule that UI acceptance uses Maestro while kind:test is reserved for non-UI logic; docs/harness/specs/acceptance.yaml demonstrates the chain on user-profile-flow; test/harness/architecture_guard_test.dart guards the status legend, approved-spec gate, and no-widget-test UI policy.

features.name: Home Step Counter
features.description: Add a step counter to the Home page that increments with a +1 button and resets to zero with a Reset button.
features.evidence: docs/harness/specs/home-counter/ defines the reviewable spec, ui-map delta, and Maestro-only UI acceptance checklist; .maestro/android and .maestro/ios contain the executable home_counter_flow; lib/features/home/presentation/bloc contains HomeCounterBloc event/state logic with 100% test coverage; lib/features/home/presentation/pages/home_page.dart renders the BLoC state with Semantics identifiers; fvm flutter test test/features/home/presentation/bloc/home_counter_bloc_test.dart passes; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check passes with 150 logic/data/BLoC/network/harness tests; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart spec accept home-counter --maestro reports PASS on the booted iPhone 16 Pro simulator with Maestro-only evidence at docs/harness/evidence/home-counter/report.json (committed to git); tool/harness.dart now includes ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools auto-discovery for easier Android acceptance on all platforms; decisions documented: device-backed Maestro checks remain explicit, coverage thresholds deferred to a future feature.
